reflex_server = None

    def test_frontend_root_renders_columns_and_titles(reflex_server):
        """The root page must contain all column labels and all seeded card titles."""
        response = requests.get(f"{FRONTEND_URL}/", timeout=15)
        assert response.status_code == 200, (
            f"Expected 200 from {FRONTEND_URL}/, got {response.status_code}"
        )
        html = response.text
        for column in ("TODO", "DOING", "DONE"):
>           assert column in html, (
                f"Expected column label {column!r} in the rendered root page HTML."
            )
E           AssertionError: Expected column label 'TODO' in the rendered root page HTML.
E           assert 'TODO' in '<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="en"><head><meta charSet="utf-8"/><meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" name=.../script><!--$--><script>window.__reactRouterContext.streamController.close();</script><!--/$--><!--/$--></body></html>'

tests.name: test_final_state.py::test_page_still_renders_all_titles_after_moves
tests.trace:
reflex_server = None

    def test_page_still_renders_all_titles_after_moves(reflex_server):
        """After several moves, all nine card titles must still be present on the root page."""
        response = requests.get(f"{FRONTEND_URL}/", timeout=15)
        assert response.status_code == 200, (
            f"Expected 200 from {FRONTEND_URL}/, got {response.status_code}"
        )
        html = response.text
        for title in ALL_TITLES:
>           assert title in html, (
                f"Expected card title {title!r} to still appear in the rendered root page "
                "HTML after move operations (page must reflect current DB state)."
            )
E           AssertionError: Expected card title 'Add tests' to still appear in the rendered root page HTML after move operations (page must reflect current DB state).
E           assert 'Add tests' in '<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="en"><head><meta charSet="utf-8"/><meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" name=.../script><!--$--><script>window.__reactRouterContext.streamController.close();</script><!--/$--><!--/$--></body></html>'
